hooks.command: openlens run --staged --agents security,bugs --no-verify --no-context --format text 2>&1 | tail -30 || true

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git (commit|push)"; then openlens run --staged --agents security,bugs --no-verify --no-context --format text >&2; else exit 0; fi'
